articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps - TechCrunch
articles.description: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.
articles.content: Google announced on Thursday that it now allows users to link and interact with some of their go-to apps right in AI Mode, the tech giant’s conversational search experience. At launch, supported apps… [+2127 chars]

articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball? - TechCrunch
articles.description: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
articles.content: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week: a $230 mini keyboard. You may not have heard that alongside this “command center for agentic work,” OpenAI also released… [+2593 chars]
